calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Asset Is Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3) & 856
Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Find That Asset Is Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3) & 856
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Continued To Aug-11-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Maureen McFadden appeared by zoom for Iris Yolanda Ramirez (Petitioner).

The Court noted that the parties are asking the Court to find that Daniel's share of the property is a trust asset, that both Daniel and Iris intended for the real property to be in the trust, but they executed the deed for refinancing, and now that Daniel is deceased, Iris wants the Court to place his share in the trust, but she has not transferred her share and questions why Iris is holding out. Ms. McFadden stated that she has a grant deed for Iris to sign and transfer her share of the property, that Iris is not holding out and that because the petition has been continued, she did not have Iris come in to sign the deed. Ms. McFadden also stated that Iris holds a 1/3 interest, that Daniel holds a 1/3 interest, that their Daughter holds the other 1/3 and that Iris has no reason to hold out. The Petition to Find That Asset is Property of Trust, etc. is continued to August 11, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Iris to get her deed recorded and for filing of a supplement regarding proof of her share being put in the trust. Ms. McFadden raised the issue of refinancing and locking in a good interest rate. The Court spoke of the possibility of this being pre-granted provided documents are received.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
